body: pre-aggregation cut p99 to ~620ms on the big pilot dataset. closing this out.
nice. let's make sure the cache invalidation path is in the runbook before freeze.
pilots specifically want retention by signup month, not week. updated the spec.
Tomoko, can you take the dark chart palette? legends are unreadable on the navy background right now.
on it. pushing the token set today, will share a Figma link for review.
structured logs are live in staging. we can now filter slow queries by customer id.
the flakiness is the snapshot diff on font rendering. pinning the headless chrome version.
runbook merged. added rollback + backfill steps per beta account. linking from the pilot doc.
scoping v1 as CSV only, weekly schedule. email delivery can be a fast follow after GA.
let's get the empty state in front of pilots at the next feedback session. low effort, high signal.
guardrail: don't ship the price test until activation v2 funnel report is trustworthy. talking to Ryan.
tracking plan reconciled with the warehouse. event names are consistent across activation now.
first cut of the drop-off report shows biggest stall at the data-connection step. expected, but now we can size it.
consolidated feedback doc is ready for the Carlos review. top three: export, cohort widget, faster load.
folding this into NS-207 instead of a separate ticket. canceling to avoid duplicate scope.
materialized cohort tables landed too — the hourly refresh holds the query budget with room to spare. closing.
great. can you also note the backfill order per pilot in the runbook so on-call isn't guessing during the launch window?
Meridian also asked for a comparison overlay on the retention chart — folding it into the same spec.
Tomoko, once the palette's in, can you also check the metric-card trend colors use the semantic tokens, not raw greens?
yep, switching the trend colors to semantic tokens in the same pass. will ping you when the library's published.
